cases.focus: reflection-visible class, property, method, attribute, final, and declaring-file shape
public property order, alias magic, dynamic details after ms_loaded, and switch/get_option path
private id/blog_id aliases, cookie-domain derivation, cache-backed instance retrieval, and public object vars
ids query, domain/network/search filters, SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS, found_sites, and max_num_pages
object query cache priming, public WP_Site instances, and count-only requests
ids query, domain/path/search filters, orderby aliases, SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS, found_networks, and max_num_pages
object query cache priming, public WP_Network instances, and count-only requests

native_boundaries.reason: The probe supplies deterministic wp_blogs, wp_site, and per-blog option rows so real WordPress multisite object/query classes can execute without a live database. Live SQL/database parity remains a later gate.
Reflection contracts intentionally capture PHP class, property, method, visibility, attribute, and declaring-file shape because plugins can inspect these surfaces.
WP_Site and WP_Network magic aliases and dynamic properties are plugin-facing PHP behavior and must remain observable during Haxe migration.
WP_Site_Query and WP_Network_Query expose request SQL, found rows, and max page counts as public runtime state.

value.value: SELECT option_name, option_value FROM wp_2_options WHERE autoload IN ( 'yes', 'on', 'auto-on', 'auto' )
SELECT * FROM wp_blogs WHERE blog_id = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM wp_site WHERE id = 7 LIMIT 1

SELECT SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS wp_blogs.blog_id FROM wp_blogs WHERE site_id = 7 AND domain IN ( 'one.example.test', 'two.example.test' ) AND (domain LIKE '%example%' OR path LIKE '%example%') ORDER BY CHAR_LENGTH(domain) DESC LIMIT 1,1

queries.query: SELECT SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS wp_blogs.blog_id FROM wp_blogs WHERE site_id = 7 AND domain IN ( 'one.example.test', 'two.example.test' ) AND (domain LIKE '%example%' OR path LIKE '%example%') ORDER BY CHAR_LENGTH(domain) DESC LIMIT 1,1

value.value: SELECT SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS wp_blogs.blog_id FROM wp_blogs WHERE site_id = 7 ORDER BY wp_blogs.blog_id ASC LIMIT 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wp_blogs WHERE site_id = 7 ORDER BY wp_blogs.blog_id ASC LIMIT 100

queries.query: SELECT SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS wp_blogs.blog_id FROM wp_blogs WHERE site_id = 7 ORDER BY wp_blogs.blog_id ASC LIMIT 2
SELECT * FROM wp_blogs WHERE blog_id IN (1,2)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wp_blogs WHERE site_id = 7 ORDER BY wp_blogs.blog_id ASC LIMIT 100

value.value: SELECT SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS wp_site.id FROM wp_site WHERE wp_site.domain IN ( 'network.example.test', 'www.alt.example.test', 'deep.network.example.test' ) AND wp_site.path IN ( '/', '/alt/', '/deep/' ) AND (wp_site.domain LIKE '%example%' OR wp_site.path LIKE '%example%') ORDER BY CHAR_LENGTH(wp_site.domain) DESC LIMIT 2

queries.query: SELECT SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS wp_site.id FROM wp_site WHERE wp_site.domain IN ( 'network.example.test', 'www.alt.example.test', 'deep.network.example.test' ) AND wp_site.path IN ( '/', '/alt/', '/deep/' ) AND (wp_site.domain LIKE '%example%' OR wp_site.path LIKE '%example%') ORDER BY CHAR_LENGTH(wp_site.domain) DESC LIMIT 2

value.value: SELECT SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS wp_site.id FROM wp_site ORDER BY wp_site.id ASC LIMIT 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wp_site WHERE wp_site.domain IN ( 'network.example.test', 'www.alt.example.test' ) ORDER BY wp_site.id ASC

queries.query: SELECT SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS wp_site.id FROM wp_site ORDER BY wp_site.id ASC LIMIT 2
SELECT wp_site.* FROM wp_site WHERE id IN (7,8)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wp_site WHERE wp_site.domain IN ( 'network.example.test', 'www.alt.example.test' ) ORDER BY wp_site.id ASC

remaining_gaps.detail: The candidate side is a copied WordPress oracle source tree until selected multisite site/network classes or query helpers move to Haxe parity candidates.
This fixture uses a deterministic wpdb test double; live MySQL/MariaDB multisite query parity remains a later installed/distribution gate.
The probe enables multisite state but does not claim full installed multisite domain/path bootstrap routing parity.
